zh.lifeSummary: 當Joanna von Jülich於1368年出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲時，她的父親Wilhelm II. von Jülich44歲，母親Marie von Guelders42歲。她和Jan V van Arkel至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1415年7月19日在荷蘭武特雷特易瑟爾斯坦享年47歲，埋葬在荷蘭武特雷特易瑟爾斯坦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joanna von Jülich于1368年出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲时，她的父亲Wilhelm II. von Jülich44岁，母亲Marie von Guelders42岁。她和Jan V van Arkel至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1415年7月19日在荷兰武特雷特易瑟爾斯坦享年47岁，埋葬在荷兰武特雷特易瑟爾斯坦。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Jülich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto.

variants.name: Juhl
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Arno, Erwin, Heinz, Kurt.

Danish and Norwegian: nickname for someone who was born on Christmas Day or had some other connection with this time of year, from Old Norse jól. This was originally the name of a pagan midwinter festival, which was later appropriated by the Christian Church for celebration of the birth of Christ.
German (of Slavic origin): nickname or topographic name from a Germanized Slavic stem gol ‘naked, barren’.

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joanna von Jülich was born in 1368, in Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, her father, Wilhelm II. von Jülich, was 44 and her mother, Marie von Guelders, was 42. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Jan V van Arkel. She died on 19 July 1415, in IJsselstein, Utrecht, Netherlands, at the age of 47, and was buried in IJsselstein, Utrecht, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joanna von Jülich est née en 1368, à Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Wilhelm II. von Jülich, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Marie von Guelders, avait 42 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Jan V van Arkel. Elle est décédée le 19 juillet 1415, à IJsselstein, Utrecht, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterrée à IJsselstein, Utrecht, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joanna von Jülich 1368 in Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Wilhelm II. von Jülich 44 und ihre Mutter Marie von Guelders 42. Sie hatte mit Jan V van Arkel mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. Juli 1415 im Alter von 47 Jahren in IJsselstein, Utrecht, Niederlande und wurde in IJsselstein, Utrecht, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joanna von Jülich è nata il nel 1368 nel Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, sua padre, Wilhelm II. von Jülich, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Marie von Guelders, aveva 42 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Jan V van Arkel. Morì il 19 luglio 1415, nel IJsselstein, Utrecht, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolta a IJsselstein, Utrecht, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Joanna von Jülichが1368年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズで生まれた時，父Wilhelm II. von Jülichは44歳，母Marie von Gueldersは42歳であった。彼女はJan V van Arkelとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1415年7月19日にオランダウトレチトイジセルステインで47歳で死去し，オランダウトレチトイジセルステインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joanna von Jülich(이)가 1368년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Wilhelm II. von Jülich(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie von Guelders(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 Jan V van Arkel(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1415년 7월 19일 네덜란드 우트레트 이제이셀스타인에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 우트레트 이제이셀스타인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joanna von Jülich nasceu em 1368, em Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, seu pai, Wilhelm II. von Jülich, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Marie von Guelders, tinha 42 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Jan V van Arkel. Ela faleceu em 19 de julho de 1415, em IJsselstein, Utrecht, Países Baixos, com 47 anos, e foi sepultada em IJsselstein, Utrecht, Países Baixos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joanna von Jülich родилась в 1368 г. в местности раинланд-пфалз, Германия, её отцу по имени Wilhelm II. von Jülich было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Marie von Guelders, 42. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Jan V van Arkel. Она умерла 19 июля 1415 г. в местности иджсселстин, утречт, Нидерланды в возрасте 47 лет и была похоронена в местности иджсселстин, утречт, Нидерланды.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joanna von Jülich nació en 1368, en Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, su papá, Wilhelm II. von Jülich, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Marie von Guelders, tenía 42 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Jan V van Arkel. Murió el 19 de julio de 1415, en IJsselstein, Utrecht, Países Bajos, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultada en IJsselstein, Utrecht, Países Bajos.
